install: sudo pg_ctlcluster 16 main start && cd backend && python -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install

terminals.name: Backend
terminals.command: sudo pg_ctlcluster 16 main start && cd backend && source .venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=/workspace:/workspace/backend python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
